steps.title: Use the repeated expression
steps.content: The first equation says $x+y=125$. The second equation is $x+y+y=155$, which is the same as $(x+y)+y=155$.

steps.title: Substitute instead of solving the whole system
steps.content: Replace $x+y$ in the second equation with $125$: $$125+y=155.$$ Subtract $125$ from both sides to get $$y=30.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The value of $y$ is 30. This method is faster than finding both coordinates because the question only asks for $y$.
